abstract.text: Run Spooktacular on AWS EC2 Mac dedicated hosts to double your macOS CI capacity.
The lifecycle state of a virtual machine.
Set up a BlueBubbles iMessage server in a macOS VM — a dramatically simpler alternative to VMware on Windows.
Understand what version numbers mean and what to expect from each release.
Run self-hosted macOS GitHub Actions runners in Spooktacular VMs with ephemeral isolation and automatic scaling.
Create and manage macOS virtual machines on Apple Silicon.
Run ML training and inference on Apple Silicon GPUs inside Spooktacular virtual machines.
Create your first macOS virtual machine in minutes.
Connect to Spooktacular VMs via VNC for remote development, QA testing, and design review.

Manage macOS virtual machines as Kubernetes resources using the MacOSVM custom resource definition.
